notes:
Release v3.9.3 - MenuController, PresetDialog, and full integration

Legacy v1.0.2 updater note: if the MacroForge Updater window stays on 'Waiting for MacroForge to close', close every MacroForge window and end any remaining MacroForge.exe process once. The old v1.0.2 updater cannot force-close itself, but the update will continue after MacroForge.exe disappears.
